From Restoration Plaza to Herbert Von King Park, we protect Bed-Stuy's architectural heritage from wood-destroying pests.

faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Bedford-Stuyvesant typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and extent of the colony. Brownstones and multi-family buildings may require more extensive treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Bed-Stuy home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants especially in spring. In Bed-Stuy's older homes, check around porches, window frames, and any areas with moisture damage or wood-to-soil contact.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Bedford-Stuyvesant brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common in Bed-Stuy's historic brownstones and townhouses due to the abundance of wooden structural elements, mature trees, and aging buildings with moisture issues. These ants excavate wood to build nests, making regular inspections essential for protecting your investment in these beautiful properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant for carpenter ant emergencies. Most treatments are completed in one visit, though severe infestations may require follow-up applications. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and provide a clear timeline during the initial inspection.
